pillars.label: Repair & Support
pillars.tagline: Fast, reliable fixes for every device

services.name: Laptop Repair
services.tagline: Screen, keyboard, battery, motherboard — we fix it all
services.description: From cracked screens to motherboard failures, our certified technicians diagnose and repair all major laptop brands. Most repairs are completed within 24–48 hours.
benefits: Free diagnosis — no fix, no charge
All brands: HP, Dell, Lenovo, Asus, Acer, Apple
process: Bring your laptop — free diagnosis on the spot
We call you with the problem and exact cost before starting
Collect your device with 30-day service warranty

services.name: Desktop Repair
services.tagline: Hardware faults, no display, slow PC — diagnosed and fixed
services.description: We repair all desktop configurations — assembled PCs, branded desktops, and all-in-ones. We also offer on-site repairs for businesses.
process: Walk in or call for on-site visit

services.name: Printer Repair
services.tagline: Paper jam, ink issues, offline errors — all printer brands
services.description: We service inkjet and laser printers from HP, Epson, Canon, and Brother. We also offer AMC contracts for offices with heavy printing needs.
process: Bring the printer or we visit your office
Repair or part replacement with quote

pillars.label: Network & CCTV
pillars.tagline: Connect and secure your home or office

services.name: Networking Solutions
services.tagline: Fast, stable WiFi and wired networks for homes and offices
services.description: We design, install, and configure network infrastructure for homes, offices, schools, and businesses. Includes router setup, cable laying, and network security.
process: Free site visit and requirements discussion

services.name: CCTV Installation
services.tagline: Protect your home, shop, or office with professional surveillance
services.description: We supply, install, and configure CCTV systems from trusted brands. Includes DVR/NVR setup, mobile app configuration, and staff training.
process: Mobile app setup and staff training

pillars.label: Software & Data
pillars.tagline: Keep your data safe and your system clean

services.name: Data Recovery
services.tagline: Deleted files, dead hard drive — we recover what matters
services.description: Professional data recovery from hard drives, SSDs, USB drives, and memory cards. We recover deleted files, formatted drives, and data from physically damaged storage.
benefits: HDD, SSD, USB, memory card support
process: Data delivered on new storage device

services.name: Virus Removal & System Cleanup
services.tagline: Slow PC, popup ads, ransomware — complete system cleaning
services.description: Full virus, malware, and spyware removal with genuine antivirus installation. System optimisation to restore performance.

services.name: Annual Maintenance Contract
services.tagline: One annual fee — unlimited IT support all year
services.description: Our AMC covers all your computers, printers, and networking equipment for a fixed annual fee. Ideal for offices, schools, and businesses who need reliable IT without surprise costs.
